'''鈭歵-sh-z''' ('''tashaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ticket|ticket]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ticket|ticket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-sh-z
|-
! Lemma
| tashaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tashazithi|tashazithi]] || [[word:tashaziji|tashaziji]] || [[word:tashazishi|tashazishi]] || [[word:tashazi|tashazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashazuthuth|tashazuthuth]] || [[word:tashazujuj|tashazujuj]] || [[word:tashazushush|tashazushush]] || [[word:tashaz|tashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashazuthu|tashazuthu]] || [[word:tashazuju|tashazuju]] || [[word:tashazushu|tashazushu]] || [[word:tashazu|tashazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashazufuth|tashazufuth]] || [[word:tashazufuj|tashazufuj]] || [[word:tashazufush|tashazufush]] || [[word:tashazuf|tashazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tashazethe|tashazethe]] || [[word:tashazeje|tashazeje]] || [[word:tashazeshe|tashazeshe]] || [[word:tashaze|tashaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashazothoth|tashazothoth]] || [[word:tashazojoj|tashazojoj]] || [[word:tashazoshosh|tashazoshosh]] || [[word:tashaz|tashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashazotho|tashazotho]] || [[word:tashazojo|tashazojo]] || [[word:tashazosho|tashazosho]] || [[word:tashazo|tashazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashazofoth|tashazofoth]] || [[word:tashazofoj|tashazofoj]] || [[word:tashazofosh|tashazofosh]] || [[word:tashazof|tashazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tashaz忙th忙|tashaz忙th忙]] || [[word:tashaz忙j忙|tashaz忙j忙]] || [[word:tashaz忙sh忙|tashaz忙sh忙]] || [[word:tashaz忙|tashaz忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashazathath|tashazathath]] || [[word:tashazajaj|tashazajaj]] || [[word:tashazashash|tashazashash]] || [[word:tashaz|tashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashazatha|tashazatha]] || [[word:tashazaja|tashazaja]] || [[word:tashazasha|tashazasha]] || [[word:tashaza|tashaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashazafath|tashazafath]] || [[word:tashazafaj|tashazafaj]] || [[word:tashazafash|tashazafash]] || [[word:tashazaf|tashazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tashazasha|tashazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotashazasha|gotashazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitashazasha|gokitashazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tashazn眉sha|tashazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotashaznkn眉sha|gotashaznkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitashazn眉sha|gokitashazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tashazsh毛sha|tashazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotashaznksh毛sha|gotashaznksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitashazsh毛sha|gokitashazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tashazrosha|tashazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotashaznkrosha|gotashaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitashazrosha|gokitashazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tashazmusha|tashazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotashaznkmusha|gotashaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashazmusha|gokitashazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tashazsherasha|tashazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotashaznksherasha|gotashaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitashazsherasha|gokitashazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tashazngasha|tashazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotashaznkngasha|gotashaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitashazngasha|gokitashazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tashazyasha|tashazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotashaznkyasha|gotashaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitashazyasha|gokitashazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tashazyamasha|tashazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotashaznkyamasha|gotashaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitashazyamasha|gokitashazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tashazn眉sh毛sha|tashazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotashaznkn眉sh毛sha|gotashaznkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitashazn眉sh毛sha|gokitashazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tashazn眉rosha|tashazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotashaznkn眉rosha|gotashaznkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitashazn眉rosha|gokitashazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashazn眉musha|tashazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotashaznkn眉musha|gotashaznkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashazn眉musha|gokitashazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tashazsh毛n眉sha|tashazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotashaznksh毛n眉sha|gotashaznksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitashazsh毛n眉sha|gokitashazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tashazsh毛rosha|tashazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotashaznksh毛rosha|gotashaznksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitashazsh毛rosha|gokitashazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashazsh毛musha|tashazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotashaznksh毛musha|gotashaznksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashazsh毛musha|gokitashazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tashazron眉sha|tashazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotashaznkron眉sha|gotashaznkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitashazron眉sha|gokitashazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tashazrosh毛sha|tashazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotashaznkrosh毛sha|gotashaznkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitashazrosh毛sha|gokitashazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashazromusha|tashazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotashaznkromusha|gotashaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashazromusha|gokitashazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tashazmun眉sha|tashazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotashaznkmun眉sha|gotashaznkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitashazmun眉sha|gokitashazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tashazmush毛sha|tashazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotashaznkmush毛sha|gotashaznkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitashazmush毛sha|gokitashazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tashazmurosha|tashazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotashaznkmurosha|gotashaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitashazmurosha|gokitashazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tashaz|tashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙sh忙z|t忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotashaz|hotashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙sh忙z|hot忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotashaz|hohotashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙sh忙z|hohot忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tashaz|n眉tashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙sh忙z|n眉t忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tashaz|n眉n眉tashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙sh忙z|n眉n眉t忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tashaz|n茂tashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙sh忙z|n茂t忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tashaz|n茂n茂tashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙sh忙z|n茂n茂t忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutashaz|lutashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙sh忙z|lut忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutashaz|lulutashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙sh忙z|lulut忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litashaz|litashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙sh忙z|lit忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitashaz|lilitashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙sh忙z|lilit忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotashaz|kotashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙sh忙z|kot忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotashaz|kokotashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙sh忙z|kokot忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketashaz|ketashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙sh忙z|ket忙sh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketashaz|keketashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙sh忙z|keket忙sh忙z]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
